xp_formula.description: Cumulative XP required for level L: 3 * (L^3 - 6 * L^2 + 17 * L - 12). Level 1 starts at 0 XP.

milestones.label: Tutorial clear
milestones.notes: Tutorial rewards are intentionally generous to leave level 1 immediately.

milestones.label: Primeira arena de 3 duelos
milestones.notes: Includes early tutorial extras and first clear bonus.

milestones.label: 30 minutos
milestones.notes: Fast first-session loop with repeated short arena attempts and base upgrades.

milestones.label: 2 horas
milestones.notes: Opening spell cadence and first pressure checks.

milestones.label: 5 horas
milestones.notes: Doutrina should become relevant without forcing long arenas.

milestones.label: 10 horas
milestones.notes: Familiar and base-building cadence begin to matter.

milestones.label: 20 horas
milestones.notes: Late Season 1 aspirational tier access without requiring cap.

milestones.label: Cap Season 1
milestones.notes: Cap 40 is aspirational for full Season 1, not a first-week requirement.
